title: hieracium dentatum subsp. vaudense
intro: Hieracium dentatum subsp. vaudense is a subspecies of the Hieracium dentatum plant, which is a type of hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hieracium dentatum subsp. vaudense has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, due to its potential to soothe and protect the mucous membranes. In herbal preparations, Hieracium dentatum subsp. vaudense can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
